title: Cytotechnologist
description: Sanofi is seeking a Cytotechnologist to analyze cell samples supporting pharmaceutical research and quality control. Work fully remote in this specialized healthcare role, contributing to the development of life-saving medicines.
responsibilities: Examine and analyze cytological specimens using microscopy
Identify abnormal cells and cellular structures
Prepare slide samples according to established protocols
Maintain detailed records and documentation of findings
Support quality control and regulatory compliance procedures
Communicate findings to supervising pathologists and researchers

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Medical Laboratory Science or related field
skills: Knowledge of cell biology and pathology
Computer skills for reporting and data entry
